info.name: Nextora - Boarding House Module
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for the Boarding House module.

**Roles & Access:**
- Student: Browse, Search, Filter only
- Non-Academic Staff: Full CRUD + Images
- Admin: Full CRUD + Images + Admin overrides
- Super Admin: Everything + Permanent Delete + Stats

**Setup:**
1. Run "Login" request first to get token
2. Token is auto-saved to `{{accessToken}}` variable
3. All subsequent requests use Bearer token automatically

item.name: Browse & Search (All Users)
item.description:
Endpoints accessible by ALL authenticated users (Students, Staff, Admin, Super Admin).
Requires: BOARDING_HOUSE:READ permission.

exec: // Save first house ID for later use

query.description: Sort field: createdAt, price, title, city, viewCount

request.description:
Get all available (not deleted, is_available=true) boarding house listings with pagination and sorting.

**Sort Options:** createdAt, price, title, city, district, viewCount
Get a specific boarding house by ID. Increments view count automatically.

query.description: Search in title, description, and city

request.description: Full-text search across title, description, and city fields. Case-insensitive partial matching.

Advanced multi-criteria filter. All parameters are optional - omit any to skip that filter.

**Gender Options:** MALE, FEMALE, ANY
**Sort Options:** createdAt, price, title, city, viewCount
Filter boarding houses by city. Partial match, case-insensitive.
Filter boarding houses by district. Partial match, case-insensitive.
Get all images for a boarding house listing, ordered by display order.

item.name: CRUD Operations (Admin / Non-Academic Staff)
item.description:
Create, Update, Delete operations.
Requires: BOARDING_HOUSE:CREATE, BOARDING_HOUSE:UPDATE, BOARDING_HOUSE:DELETE

**Allowed Roles:** Admin, Super Admin, Non-Academic Staff

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Spacious Room Near IIT Colombo",
    "description": "Fully furnished room with attached bathroom. 10 minutes walk to IIT campus. Includes WiFi, daily cleaning, and 3 meals. Quiet neighborhood ideal for studying.",
    "price": 15000.00,
    "address": "42/A, Galle Road, Wellawatte",
    "city": "Colombo",
    "district": "Colombo",
    "genderPreference": "ANY",
    "totalRooms": 5,
    "availableRooms": 3,
    "contactName": "Mrs. Perera",
    "contactPhone": "+94771234567",
    "contactEmail": "perera.boarding@gmail.com",
    "amenities": ["WiFi", "Meals", "Laundry", "Hot Water", "Study Room"],
    "isAvailable": true
}

request.description:
Create a new boarding house listing.

**Required fields:** title, price, address, city, district, contactName, contactPhone
**Optional fields:** description, genderPreference (default: ANY), totalRooms, availableRooms, contactEmail, amenities, isAvailable (default: true)

**Note:** Images are uploaded separately via the image upload endpoint after creation.

request.description: Create a female-only boarding house listing.

Update a boarding house listing. Only provided fields are updated (partial update).

**Access:** Owner of the listing OR Admin/Super Admin can update.
Mark a boarding house as unavailable (fully booked). It won't show in student browse results but remains in admin view.

Soft delete a boarding house listing. Sets is_deleted=true. Can be restored later.

**Access:** Owner or Admin/Super Admin.
Get all boarding house listings created by the currently logged-in user.

Admin-only endpoint. Shows ALL non-deleted listings including unavailable ones.

**Requires:** BOARDING_HOUSE:ADMIN_READ permission (Admin, Super Admin only).

item.name: Image Management (S3)
item.description:
Upload, delete, and manage boarding house images stored in AWS S3.

**Limits:**
- Max 10 images per listing
- Max 5MB per image
- Allowed types: JPEG, PNG, WebP

Requires: BOARDING_HOUSE:UPDATE permission

formdata.description: Select one or more image files (JPEG, PNG, WebP). Max 5MB each.

request.description:
Upload one or more images for a boarding house listing.

**How to use in Postman:**
1. Select Body > form-data
2. Key: `files` (type: File)
3. Click "Select Files" and choose images
4. To upload multiple: add more rows with key `files`

**Constraints:**
- Max 10 images per listing total
- Max 5MB per image file
- Allowed types: JPEG (.jpg/.jpeg), PNG (.png), WebP (.webp)
- First image uploaded becomes the primary/cover image automatically

**Access:** Owner of listing or Admin.
Upload multiple images at once. Enable multiple file rows and select different images for each.
Get all images for a boarding house listing, sorted by display order.
Set an image as the primary/cover image for the listing. The previous primary image is unset automatically.

Delete an image from the listing. Removes from both S3 and database.

If the deleted image was the primary image, the next image in display order automatically becomes primary.

item.name: Admin Operations (Super Admin)
item.description:
Admin override operations.
Base path: /api/v1/admin/boardinghouse

**Admin Update/Delete:** Requires BOARDING_HOUSE:ADMIN_UPDATE or ADMIN_DELETE (Admin, Super Admin)
**Permanent Delete:** Requires BOARDING_HOUSE:PERMANENT_DELETE (Super Admin ONLY)
**Stats:** Requires BOARDING_HOUSE:ADMIN_READ

request.description:
Admin can update ANY boarding house listing regardless of ownership. No ownership check performed.

**Requires:** BOARDING_HOUSE:ADMIN_UPDATE permission.

Admin soft-delete any listing regardless of ownership.

**Requires:** BOARDING_HOUSE:ADMIN_DELETE permission.

**SUPER ADMIN ONLY** - Permanently delete a boarding house from the database. This also deletes all associated images from S3.

**WARNING:** This action is IRREVERSIBLE. The listing, all images, and all associated data will be permanently removed.

**Requires:** BOARDING_HOUSE:PERMANENT_DELETE permission (Super Admin only).

Get boarding house platform statistics.

**Response includes:**
- totalListings: Total non-deleted listings
- availableListings: Currently available
- unavailableListings: Currently unavailable (fully booked)
- totalViews: Sum of all view counts
- maleOnlyListings: Male-only listings count
- femaleOnlyListings: Female-only listings count
- anyGenderListings: Any-gender listings count

**Requires:** BOARDING_HOUSE:ADMIN_READ permission.

item.name: Error Scenarios (Testing)
item.description: Test requests that should return error responses. Use these to verify error handling works correctly.

request.description: Try to get a non-existent boarding house. Should return 404.
Try to create a listing without required fields (title, price, address, city, district, contactName, contactPhone). Should return 400 with validation errors.
Try to create with negative price. Should return 400.
Try to access without authentication token. Should return 401.

**Login as Student first!**

Students only have BOARDING_HOUSE:READ permission. Attempting to create should return 403 Forbidden.

**Login as Student first!**

Students cannot delete listings. Should return 403.

**Login as Admin (not Super Admin) first!**

Only Super Admin can permanently delete. Admin should get 403.
Try to delete a non-existent image. Should return 404.
